title: Funny Statue for Terry Jones
summary: A statue of Terry Jones, a funny actor from the Monty Python comedy group, will be shown in Colwyn Bay, Wales, where he was born. Terry Jones died in 2020 at age 77 from a rare brain disease. The statue shows him as a funny character: a naked man playing an organ. His friend Michael Palin said Terry would think the statue is very funny. Many famous people helped raise money for the statue, and they got enough money in six months. The sculptor worked very hard for a year and a half to make the statue perfect. The statue also includes a desk with books because Terry wrote history books too. People will see the statue on Saturday near the beach.

someone who tells jokes and makes people laugh
a musical instrument with keys and pipes
a brown metal used to make statues

showing something for the first time

What character does the statue show?

background_read: Terry Jones was a famous British comedian and writer. He was part of the Monty Python group, which made funny TV shows and movies. The statue shows one of his funny characters from the show.
Article_Structure: WHO: Terry Jones, a funny actor from Monty Python
WHAT: A statue of Terry Jones will be shown to the public
WHERE: In Colwyn Bay, Wales, where he was born
WHY: To remember him and make people smile

perspectives.description: Fans are happy because they loved Terry Jones and his comedy.
His family wanted a statue that shows his funny side.
